title: [codereview-pass3-robustness] P3: desync FSM does not explicitly address interaction with lichen_tdma_init() order or has_key flag before signing in ACQUIRING
description: Per AGENTS.md init graph and common pitfalls in lichen/subsys/lichen/link_ctx.h:50. FSM table should note that in ACQUIRING/SYNCED, link key load MUST be verified before beacon signature check. Add normative step. File as robustness finding. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-ttam
